text:
The Yorbian Continent (, Yorubian Tairiku) is one of the six continents of the Hunter × Hunter world. Yorknew City, famous for its auctions, is located on this continent. It is also where a severed body part of the Chimera Ant Queen was first found. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 187 

Known Countries

United States of Saherta

Trivia

The Yorbian Continent is roughly similar in appearance to the North American continent of the real world.
Its name is based on Europian continent.
